check_content_excerpt:
Review DBMS configuration to verify DBMS user accounts are being mapped directly to unique identifying information within the validated PKI certificate.

If user accounts are not being mapped to authenticated identities, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the DBMS to map the authenticated identity directly to the DBMS user account.
title: Oracle Database must map the authenticated identity to the user account using public key infrastructure (PKI)-based authentication.
